Marcus Lee
marcus.lee@example.com
Subject line
Marcus Lee, a high-context enterprise role in Cybersecurity
Suggested angle — Reference CrowdStrike credibility, then position the role as a chance to shape a more builder-led enterprise motion.
Hi Marcus, I'm reaching out about an Enterprise Account Executive opening that maps closely to your work at CrowdStrike. We're looking for someone who can carry complex enterprise cycles, translate a strong security narrative, and help shape the next phase of go-to-market rather than just inherit a mature patch. What stood out: - Relevant security or identity background - Enterprise selling motion - Reference CrowdStrike credibility, then position the role as a chance to shape a more builder-led enterprise motion. If the timing is right, I'd love to share the team, market story, and why this role matters now. Best, sodacircle
